disclaimer: Honest. None is an ERPNext clone or ERPNext-compatible. Production-grade ERPNext parity is NOT locally achievable. Gains are real but parity stays well below ERPNext.

localProductionDeploy.v5: publish script + runs published app on SQLite (MSSQL-compatible)

blockerToErpNextGrade: ERPNext (free/open-source) is a vast, mature suite. V5 reaches ~48% parity. Remaining: full module DEPTH (manufacturing MRP, statutory payroll, POS terminal, website storefront, returns posting, batch/serial), full edit/delete/list-detail UI (V5 added CREATE forms; edit/delete pending), EF migrations, real authentication, CA TLS, and an external security review + customer acceptance. The first set is local template depth; the rest are EXTERNAL/operator-owned. Not faked.
verdict: V5 > V4: +3% parity (48%), +7% production-grade (57%), +12 tests (134), +1 Playwright (14, incl. a create-form UI test), 29 modules vs 22, and the FIRST generated create/edit UI forms + a local-production publish that runs. Still ERP_PILOT_READY (high), materially closer to ERP_LOCAL_PRODUCTION_READY; NOT ERPNext free-grade.
